---
title: "What’s New & Updated"
subtitle: "Posts about papers, talks, news, and more"
description-meta: "Posts about papers, events, news, and more"
listing: 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 100
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  contents: 
      - posts/awards
      - posts/papers
      - posts/talks
      - posts/news
      - posts/post-links.yml  # Use this file to add external links
#      categories: [] 

# page-layout: full
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{#posts}
:::
